column5: Hospitalization expenses are covered when admission exceeds 24 hours.
Claims are not payable during the first 30 days except accidental hospitalization.
Pre-existing diseases are covered only after 48 months of continuous coverage.
Cosmetic and aesthetic procedures are not covered.
Cataract surgery reimbursement is limited to INR 50000 per eye.
Discharge summary and hospital bills are mandatory.
Vehicle damage caused by accidents is covered.
Vehicle theft is covered after FIR submission.
Claims are rejected if driver lacked a valid driving license.
Claims arising from alcohol influence are not covered.
FIR is mandatory for theft claims.
Death benefit payable to nominee when policy is active.
Suicide within first 12 months is excluded.
Death certificate must be submitted.
Nominee identity proof is mandatory.
Fire damage to insured property is covered.
Flood damage is covered under comprehensive plans.
Normal wear and tear is not covered.
Property damage photographs are mandatory.
Crop loss due to drought is covered.
Crop loss due to flood is covered.
Crop loss due to cyclone is covered.
Intentional crop destruction is not covered.
A crop survey report is mandatory.
